text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Knock, knock.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Tachyooon, I'm coming iiin. I wanna talk to you
about this new item...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You experimenting again? What are you making
this time?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah—the young witch. Come in, come in. Today,
I'm concocting a solution for rapid muscle pain
relief.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Drinking this will ease the pain instantly... There's
only the small side effect of your hair turning
rainbow-colored.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait, rainbow-colored?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's sooo cool! It sounds like a magic spell!
Tachyon, you really know your stuff. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why stop at just colors? You should make it
do a bunch of things.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Like make it turn your hair all sparkly or smell like
a sweet dessert!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hm... A change that stimulates one's vision and
sense of smell. That doesn't sound half bad. It
could help the subject to relax further, thereby
speeding up the recovery process.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the suggestion, Sweep. Your
creativity gives vibrancy to my ideas.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you know it! ♪ Maybe I even deserve
something as thanks, huh?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You seek a reward? Very well, allow me to pour
you a cup of tea. This particular type is known as
flowering tea.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I could explain it to you, but perhaps a
demonstration is quicker. I'll brew it straightaway.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The flower is blooming inside the cup!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
The floating petals look so pretty... I could stare
at this forever...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you like it so much. You have quite the
penchant for flowers and the like.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Don't you too? ♪ I love pretty things, whether
they're magic or not.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Then maybe I should try my hand at
making some jewels. I could infuse them with
magnetic fatigue-relieving properties.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Wait, jewels?! That sounds amazing! You better
give me some when you're done. ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you volunteering to be a test subject?
Hehe... Then come along. For you, I have a
plethora of things in store.
